programme.title: Kedarnath
programme.desc: After a Muslim porter falls in love with the rebellious daughter of a Hindu priest, their love is tested due to misunderstandings and a natural disaster.

programme.title: Ki & Ka
programme.desc: Kia, an ambitious woman, marries Kabir, a man who prefers the role of a house husband. They enjoy their unconventional relationship until challenges such as ego clashes and jealousy set in.

programme.title: Anjaana Anjaani
programme.desc: Akash and Kiara, two heartbroken and suicidal people, find each other just as they are about to end their lives. The duo then decide to live life to the fullest until New Year's Day.

programme.title: Golmaal: Fun Unlimited
programme.desc: Friends Gopal, Lucky, Madhav and Laxman often dupe gullible people out of their money. Hilarity ensues when they target a middle-aged couple and simultaneously try wooing their beautiful neighbour.

programme.title: Half Girlfriend
programme.desc: After meeting in college, Madhav is smitten with Riya and falls in love with her. However, after his repeated attempts to win her over, she eventually agrees to become his half girlfriend.

programme.title: 14 Phere
programme.desc: Sanjay, a Rajput, is in love with Aditi, a Jat, and wants to get married. However, they realise that their parents would never allow it, so they come up with a cunning plan to get married.

programme.title: Khuda Haafiz: Chapter 2 - Agni Pariksha
programme.desc: After the death of his friend's brother, Sameer and Nargis adopt his daughter Nandini. However, trouble ensues when she gets kidnapped.

programme.title: Auron Mein Kahan Dum Tha
programme.desc: As Krishna, an incarcerated man, faces early release, his love story with Vasudha from more than twenty years ago unfurls.

programme.title: Kabir Singh
programme.desc: A genius but short-tempered surgeon falls madly in love with a girl. However, he begins to self-destruct after the girl's father marries her off to another.

programme.title: Dhamaal
programme.desc: Four lazy friends learn about a hidden treasure in Goa and set out to find it. However, a police inspector learns about their plan and begins to pursue them.

programme.title: Krrish 3
programme.desc: Krishna lives happily with his wife Priya and his father. However, their peaceful life is shattered when Kaal abducts Priya.
